chunks.title: Call to Return and Circumcise
chunks.reason: A unified call for Israel to return to Yahweh with a circumcised heart.

chunks.title: Trumpet Call and Lament
chunks.reason: A prophetic speech announcing the trumpet call for safety from the north.

chunks.title: The Scorching Wind and Siege
chunks.reason: An oracle describing the enemy's arrival as a scorching wind and siege.

chunks.title: Self-Inflicted Destruction
chunks.reason: An argument stating that the people's own ways have caused their ruin.

chunks.title: Vision of Desolation
chunks.reason: A vision depicting the earth returning to chaos and void before Yahweh's judgment.

chunks.title: Flight and Lament of Zion
chunks.reason: A narrative description of cities fleeing and the daughter of Zion's final lament.
